news.title: Airlines race to open new routes to world's second-richest country
news.content: Airlines are expanding direct services to Singapore, the world's second-richest country by GDP per capita in The Economist's 2025 ranking, as rising travel demand is fueled by the city-state's low street crime, high safety standards, and thriving tourism sector.

news.title: Vietnam AI Festival 2026 to spotlight rise of autonomous AI agents
news.content: The 2026 Vietnam Artificial Intelligence Festival (AI4VN), themed "Agentic AI," will be held in November at Vietnam National University Hanoi, bringing together policymakers, businesses, researchers, and the technology community.

news.title: Gold prices rise marginally
news.content: Vietnam gold prices edged up Tuesday afternoon, a slight recovery from a two-week downward trend.

news.title: Vietnamese men become Japan region's first foreign bus drivers amid labor shortage
news.content: Two Vietnamese nationals have become the first foreign bus drivers to operate regular routes in Japan's Shikoku region as the country grabbles severe manpower shortage.

news.title: Cristiano Ronaldo named in 2026 World Cup's most disappointing XI
news.content: Cristiano Ronaldo, Kevin De Bruyne, Florian Wirtz and Casemiro were selected into the most disappointing XI of the 2026 World Cup, according to a poll conducted by major Brazilian newspaper Globo Esporte.

news.title: Foreign tourists plant 5,000 trees along denuded Ha Giang Loop
news.content: Instead of just sightseeing, thousands of foreign visitors have spent the last two months planting trees to help restore hillsides and reduce erosion in Vietnam's northern mountains.

news.title: Veteran Singapore hawker who runs Michelin-recognized noodles stall dies at 79
news.content: Veteran Singapore hawker Ng Hock Chuan, who ran the Michelin-recognized Ah Hock Fried Hokkien Noodles stall at Chomp Chomp Food Centre, died at the age of 79 on July 16, according to a tribute posted on Facebook by a long-time patron.

news.title: Singapore minister resigns over 'interactions with a woman'
news.content: Singapore's Acting Minister-in-charge of Muslim Affairs Faishal Ibrahim has resigned from office over his interactions with a woman, Prime ​Minister Lawrence Wong said in a statement.

news.title: 9 dead, 15 trapped after India tunnel collapse
news.content: At least nine people have died and 15 others remained trapped after a tunnel collapsed at an under-construction hydroelectric project in India's remote northeast, officials said Tuesday.

news.title: Argentina criticized for turning away when Spain lift World Cup trophy
news.content: Spanish media have slammed the unsportsmanlike action of the Argentina national team following a chaotic 2026 World Cup final, as they turned their backs when Spain were lifting the trophy.

news.title: Sheraton Saigon unveils Level 23 with new event space and rooftop bar
news.content: Sheraton Saigon Grand Opera Hotel has launched Level 23, bringing together meeting, event and rooftop entertainment venues at its property in downtown Ho Chi Minh City.

news.title: Priced out of Tsinghua once, Vietnamese scholar bounces back with full PhD scholarship
news.content: After giving up her dream of studying at Tsinghua University because she could not afford tuition, a Vietnamese woman spent a year preparing and later secured a full Chinese Government Scholarship (CSC) to pursue a PhD at the prestigious institution.

news.title: Naturalized midfielder Thom Haye wants to help Indonesia end ASEAN Cup title drought
news.content: Dutch-born midfielder Thom Haye has expressed high determination to help Indonesia make history at the 2026 ASEAN Cup.

news.title: Chinese nationals selling copper as gold fools jewelers across Vietnam
news.content: Police in Hai Phong have broken up a ring that sold jewelry shops across Vietnam gold-plated fakes made of copper and tungsten, the city's investigation police said July 19.

news.title: 3 female tourists walk 9.4 km to Singapore Changi Airport at 3 am to catch flight
news.content: Three women have gone viral after walking nearly 9.4 kilometers to Singapore's Changi Airport at 3 a.m. rather than taking a 16-minute car ride, prompting online users to praise the city-state's safety for tourists.
